creator: linpct@gmail.com
text:
Hello, Steve,

    I've update the graphics/p5-Image-ExifTool-devel port to 9.16.

    Please also close the old PR (
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/175665), thanks!




2013/2/4 <FreeBSD-gnats-submit@freebsd.org>

> Thank you very much for your problem report.
> It has the internal identification `ports/175816'.
> The individual assigned to look at your
> report is: freebsd-ports-bugs.
